lines.speaker: M.G.
lines.text: Hi Maria — got 90 seconds? I'll be quick.

lines.speaker: Maria
lines.text: Yeah, go ahead.

lines.speaker: M.G.
lines.text: I noticed Two Pines opened a second location on Deansgate in January — congrats. How are you splitting card spend between the two right now?

lines.speaker: Maria
lines.text: Honestly? Same card. We reconcile end of month and it's a mess.

lines.speaker: M.G.
lines.text: So end-of-month reconciliation across both stores is eating bookkeeper time — sounds painful.

lines.speaker: Maria
lines.text: She's at it six hours a week, easy.

lines.speaker: M.G.
lines.text: Got it. Two 20-minute slots: Tuesday 10:00 or Wednesday 10:30 — which works to walk through it with your bookkeeper?

lines.speaker: Maria
lines.text: Wednesday 10:30. Send the invite.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Tom — quick question, you on Brex?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Yeah, we are. Why?

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Well, our per-team budgets are way better than Brex's — way more granular controls and the SSO is cleaner.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: OK, well, we just rolled out Brex three months ago. Not changing.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Sure, but our AWS-spend visibility is actually real-time, not 30-day lagged like Brex.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Look, I have to go. Send me an email if you want.

lines.speaker: M.G.
lines.text: Hi Emma — saw Brightline's latest filing, headcount up 18% this year. How is procurement handling card-tagging at that scale?

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: Badly. Finance tags four hundred transactions a month by hand. Sage doesn't see the job-numbers.

lines.speaker: M.G.
lines.text: So you've got 400 manual tags landing on finance every month because Sage can't read job-numbers off the card transactions — that's the bottleneck.

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: Exactly. We tried two vendors. Both promised Sage line-level export. Both broke it.

lines.speaker: M.G.
lines.text: Fair. Could I get 20 minutes with you and your Sage admin together — Tuesday 14:00 or Thursday 11:30 — to show you the actual export against a real Sage file?

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: Thursday 11:30. I'll bring our Sage admin.
